# aisw

> Documentation for aisw, a CLI for switching between Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI accounts.

Current version: 0.1.0

## Docs

- [aisw AI Switcher Documentation](https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/): Install, configure, and use aisw, the AI Switcher for Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI accounts.
- [Quickstart](https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/quickstart/): Install aisw, run first-time setup, add profiles, and switch accounts quickly.
- [Commands](https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/commands/): Full command reference for aisw commands, flags, and usage patterns.
- [Automation and Scripting](https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/automation/): Understand prompt behavior, JSON output, stdout/stderr expectations, and safe scripting patterns for aisw.
- [Shell Integration](https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/shell-integration/): Set up shell hooks, completions, and shell-specific integration for aisw.
- [Adding Profiles](https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/adding-profiles/): Understand OAuth and API key profile flows for each supported tool.
- [Supported Tools](https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/supported-tools/): See which tools aisw supports and how authentication works for each one.
- [Configuration](https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/configuration/): Reference the aisw config file, active profile state, and stored settings.

## Project

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/burakdede/aisw): Source code, releases, and issue tracking.
- [README](https://github.com/burakdede/aisw/blob/main/README.md): Project overview and install guidance.
